message:
Running command: # NC_UART v1.7.1 has a flat structure - no /rtl/common/ subdirectory
# The nc_fifo, nc_glitch_filter, nc_ticker files are now in NC_COMMON instead
find /nc/ip/NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl/ -name "nc_fifo.v" -o -name "nc_glitch_filter.v" -o -name "nc_ticker.v" 2>/dev/null
echo "---check UART filelist---"
cat /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/nc_uart.f 2>/dev/null | head -20

function.arguments:

echo "---check UART filelist---"
cat /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/nc_uart.f 2>/dev/null | head -20"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# NC_UART v1.7.1 has a flat structure - no /rtl/common/ subdirectory
# The nc_fifo, nc_glitch_filter, nc_ticker files are now in NC_COMMON instead
find /nc/ip/NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl/ -name "nc_fifo.v" -o -name "nc_glitch_filter.v" -o -name "nc_ticker.v" 2>/dev/null
echo "---check UART filelist---"
cat /nc/ip/NC_UART/v1.7.1/rtl/nc_uart.f 2>/dev/null | head -20
